nl_prompt: Who are our top 10 customers by lifetime revenue?

nl_prompt: What is the average days between order and shipment per product category?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    p.category,
    AVG(ld.delivery_date - o.ship_date) AS average_days_between_order_and_shipment
FROM 
    orders o
JOIN 
    order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN 
    products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
JOIN 
    logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.shipping_ref
GROUP BY 
    p.category

nl_prompt: What is the monthly revenue trend for the last 12 months?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', orders.order_date) AS month,
    SUM(orders.line_value) AS monthly_revenue
FROM 
    orders
WHERE 
    orders.order_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', orders.order_date)
ORDER BY 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', orders.order_date)

nl_prompt: What is the revenue from completed orders versus pending orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN o.status = 'completed' THEN 'Completed'
        ELSE 'Pending'
    END AS order_status,
    SUM(o.line_value) AS revenue
FROM 
    orders o
GROUP BY 
    order_status

nl_prompt: Which customers with active CRM deals had delivery issues?
generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.name, c.email
FROM customers c
JOIN sf_accounts sa ON c.email = sa.email_address
JOIN sf_opportunities so ON sa.account_id = so.account_id
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.shipping_ref
WHERE so.stage = 'Closed Won' AND ld.status_code != 0

nl_prompt: What is the on-time delivery rate by CRM deal stage?
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    sf_opportunities.stage AS deal_stage,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN logistics_deliveries.status_code = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS on_time_deliveries,
    COUNT(logistics_deliveries.id) AS total_deliveries,
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN logistics_deliveries.status_code = 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0 / COUNT(logistics_deliveries.id)) AS on_time_delivery_rate
FROM 
    logistics_deliveries
JOIN 
    orders ON logistics_deliveries.shipping_ref = orders.shipping_id

    sf_opportunities ON orders.opp_id = sf_opportunities.opp_id

    sf_opportunities.stage

nl_prompt: Which logistics carrier has the worst on-time rate for top revenue customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT l.carrier_name, AVG(CASE WHEN o.status = 'shipped' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_rate
FROM logistics_deliveries l
JOIN orders o ON l.tracking_id = o.shipping_id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
WHERE c.segment = 'top'
GROUP BY l.carrier_name
ORDER BY on_time_rate DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: Summarize delivery complaint themes for top 10 revenue customers.
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.name AS customer_name,
    SUM(od.line_value) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(od.id) AS order_count,
    AVG(od.line_value) AS average_order_value,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN od.status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS return_count,
    SUM(od.line_value * (1 - od.discount_pct)) AS net_revenue,
    SUM(od.line_value * od.discount_pct) AS discount_amount,
    SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity) AS total_cost,
    SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount_pct)) AS net_cost,
    SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity * od.discount_pct) AS discount_cost,
    SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount_pct) - od.line_value * od.quantity * od.discount_pct) AS gross_profit,
    SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount_pct) - od.line_value * od.quantity * od.discount_pct) / SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity) AS gross_margin,
    SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount_pct) - od.line_value * od.quantity * od.discount_pct) / SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity) * 100 AS gross_margin_percentage,
    SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount_pct) - od.line_value * od.quantity * od.discount_pct) / SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity) * 100 / SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity) AS gross_margin_percentage_per_order,
    SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount_pct) - od.line_value * od.quantity * od.discount_pct) / SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity) * 100 / SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity) * 100 AS gross_margin_percentage_per_order_percentage,
    SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount_pct) - od.line_value * od.quantity * od.discount_pct) / SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity) * 100 / SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity) * 100 AS gross_margin_percentage_per_order_percentage_percentage,
    SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount_pct) - od.line_value * od.quantity * od.discount_pct) / SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity) * 100 / SUM(od.line_value * od.quantity) * 100 AS gross

nl_prompt: Find customers who mentioned competitors in support.
generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.name
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE p.category = 'Competitor'

nl_prompt: What were top 3 reasons for returns?
generated_sql: SELECT reason, COUNT(*) AS return_count FROM returns GROUP BY reason ORDER BY return_count DESC LIMIT 3

nl_prompt: Which sales reps have customers with most positive feedback?
generated_sql:
SELECT sales_reps.rep_name
FROM sales_reps
JOIN orders ON sales_reps.id = orders.sales_rep_id
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.id
WHERE customers.segment = 'Positive Feedback'
GROUP BY sales_reps.rep_name
ORDER BY COUNT(customers.id) DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: Summarize key themes for Enterprise segment accounts.
generated_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN c.segment = 'Enterprise' THEN o.line_value ELSE 0 END) AS total_revenue, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count, AVG(o.line_value) AS avg_order_value, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS customer_count, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(o.id) AS return_rate, SUM(CASE WHEN d.status_code = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delivery_delay_days, SUM(p.cost_price * o.quantity) AS cogs FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id JOIN logistics_deliveries d ON o.shipping_id = d.shipping_ref WHERE c.segment = 'Enterprise'

generated_sql: SELECT r.reason FROM returns r INNER JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.id INNER JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE c.segment = 'Churned'

nl_prompt: Find orders where complaints mention product defects.
generated_sql:
SELECT o.id, o.order_date, o.line_value, p.name AS product_name
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE o.status = 'returned' AND p.name LIKE '%defect%'
